title: Tableau Liquid Leather Cleaner 500ml. Cleans Restores Leather Furniture, Clothing, Luggage and Car Seats. Perfect for Cleaning and Restoring Leather Surfaces. Does Not Require Dilution. Ready to Use
features: LIQUID LEATHER CLEANER: A powerful yet gentle fast-acting formula designed to penetrate and lift away embedded dirt, grease, and surface grime from leather surfaces. Ideal for use on car interiors, furniture, handbags, and other leather goods, it restores cleanliness without drying or damaging the material, helping maintain the leather’s natural look, feel, and longevity. Perfect for regular maintenance and deep cleaning.

DEEP CLEAN: Tableau Leather Cleaner penetrates deep into the leather grain to lift dirt and grime from within. Infused with lanolin and conditioning oils, it cleans while moisturising, helping restore softness, suppleness, and a natural, healthy finish.

LEATHER RESTORER: Revives tired, faded leather by restoring its natural finish, colour depth, and original lustre. Helps reduce the appearance of wear, dryness, and minor scuffs, leaving the surface looking refreshed, supple, and like new.

DIRECTIONS: Use only as directed. Shake bottle thoroughly and test on an inconspicuous area first. If any adverse reaction or undesirable finish results, do not use. Apply cleaner evenly with a soft clean cloth and leave for 30 seconds. Wipe off and buff with a soft dry cloth. Apply Tableau Leather Cream to finish.

ABOUT US: Based in Bexhill on the Sussex coast, Tableau is a proud family-run business dedicated to producing high-quality home care products. From the beginning, our mission has been clear: to offer a reliable range of products that combine outstanding performance with exceptional customer service. Over the years, we've expanded our selection to meet evolving customer needs—always guided by feedback from those who use our products every day. Quality Homecare Products, Made in Great Britain.
